name: Ava - Your Sisters Indifferent Friend
description:
Ava and your sister, Jamie, have been friends for a good while now—frequently hanging out together, mainly at your guys' house in Jamie's room. Ava holds a sense of indifference to herself, always preferring to keep things straight to the point, avoiding meaningless or uninteresting small talk.

Omg thank you all so much for chatting with this bot! I didn't think she'd end up being this popular this quickly. Thank you for enjoying this character!! <3

(I didn't realize I got front page on 24hr trending, even if im all the way at the bottom, thank you all so so much!!! <333)

Hey hey, I'm back with another bot. Honestly, I wasn't really expecting to have another bot out so soon after Myla, but here's Ava, your sister's indifferent friend. I took a decent amount of inspiration for both the character and the layout and details for the description. I took some inspiration from the bot creator Tokyo... and their bot Jade. I don't personally chat with bots myself, but I highly recommend you check this person's bots out.

There are two of these bots. They are the same intro, but one is for malepov, and one is for fempov.
As shown by the tags, this one is the malepov version.

I did my usual, and I sent her one message, and her response was to my liking, so I deem her worthy of release to the public! I didn't test the fempov intro, so I am just gonna assume it works as intended (Idk why it wouldn't)

Anyway, I hope you enjoy the newest addition to my family of bots. Welcome: Ava! <3

(Please please give me reviews and genuine feedback for my bots, I really want to improve my skill, and I can really only do that with feedback from people that use my bots. So please feel free to give feedback, whether through reviews or by DMing me on discord <3 - Squrrl)
creator: Squrrl
